full_text:
Li Fu (Zixian) 李孚 (子憲)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Fu (李孚), styledZixian (子憲), was born in Julu. Snuck through the Wei lines into Ye and then back out again. Li Fu was affiliated with Yuan Shang, Yuan Tan, and the Wei Kingdom.
